useful_outputs: Route/static mismatch diagnosis with cause category D

Regenerated full runtime receipt/side manifest with explicit HTML/CSS/JS/API/FPS truth fields
Fix report, runner report, chronology, self-assessment, gate receipt, action card artifacts
waste_points: Initial runner had a hardcoded target path and required manual blocker interpretation loop.
Prior FPS readings on 404 context caused misleading performance loops.
missing_tools: Dedicated reusable route-probe utility shared across runtime/browser audit runners.
Unified verdict normalizer for runtime audit families.

generated_tools_to_preserve.note: Improved and now reusable, but still should be folded into Scriptorium family after type hardening.

recommended_script_absorption: Promote route-discovery/proxy helper functions into shared runtime audit utility module after explicit absorption task.
Add type-hardening follow-up under Python type safety backlog.
future_prompt_improvements: Require explicit route candidate list in runtime audit tasks by default.
Require top-level receipt keys for HTML/CSS/JS/API/FPS truth in initial runner contracts.
future_gate_or_checklist_recommendations: Add a pre-browser gate check: browser target must be HTTP 200 before FPS measurement.
Add gate checklist item: required static assets requested and loaded before full baseline verdict.
